import React, { useEffect } from 'react' import stretchedHero from '../../assets/stretched_hero.png' import stretchedDemoOne from '../../assets/stretched_demo_image_1.png' import stretchedDemoTwo from '../../assets/stretched_demo_image_2.png' import stretchedDemoThree from '../../assets/stretched_demo_image_3.png' import './StretchedProjectPage.css' const StretchedProjectPage = () => { useEffect(() => { window.scrollTo(0, 0) }, []) return (

Stretched

The Journey

I paired up with my current business partner about a year ago in helping her develop this idea of hers. Long story short, she recognized how crazy the demand was for high-end athleisure products - specifically used ones.

There are, in fact, several Facebook marketplaces with over 40 thousand members each that exist solely for the purpose of buying and selling Lululemon products. She and I both knew that we could make our own marketplace that not only looked and felt better but also provided something unique to the user.

The Platform

When I was first researching some options in terms of the right platform to use, I came across ShareTribe. I have nothing but good things to say about this company.

Not only do they provide complete templates for peer-to-peer marketplaces, but their support system and developer network is so rich. After I did my (mostly aesthetic) work on the platform, Sharetribe connected me with a great team of developers that I hired to finish out the project.

In tandem I've been working with my business partner in developing the platform from a business side of things. We are expected to launch sometime in December!

) } export default StretchedProjectPage
